Action: Business Verifier creates a verification request through the management API; Verifier generates a verification deeplink
Data:
- Verifier management API endpoint
- Accepted issuer DID
- Presentation definition
- Deeplink generation request
Expected Result: Verification request successfully created in management system; deeplink generated

Action: Business Verifier provides the verification deeplink to the wallet
Data:
- Verification deeplink URI
- Deeplink format: swiyu-verify://
Expected Result: Deeplink successfully generated and follows correct swiyu-verify:// URI scheme
